agent.name: ux-flow-auditor
agent.role: Audits UX flows and copy for gaps, missing states, and inconsistencies.

coverage.incomplete_reason: Agent capped coverage after surfacing highest-value UX gaps for the March 2026 run.

findings.title: Inconsistent login terminology
findings.description: Authentication entry points mix "Sign in", "Log in", and "Open login", creating inconsistent primary actions across the flow.

proof_hooks.summary: Login form renders differing CTA copy compared to signup links.
Signup form copy diverges with alternate login phrasing.

findings.impact: Inconsistent CTAs erode trust and make onboarding feel fragmented.

suggested_fix.approach: Standardize authentication copy to a single verb pair (e.g., "Log in" / "Sign up") across LoginForm and SignupForm.

findings.title: Inconsistent save terminology
findings.description: Save actions alternate between "Save Changes", "Save", and passive phrasing without consistent casing or verbs.

proof_hooks.summary: Smart default types define varying save copy strings.

findings.impact: Users receive mixed signals about whether changes persist automatically or require confirmation.

suggested_fix.approach: Align save-related copy on a single pattern (e.g., "Save changes") and apply across smart defaults and UI surfaces.

findings.title: Placeholder text in production
findings.description: Lorem ipsum placeholder strings remain in production-bound copy definitions.

proof_hooks.summary: Design signatures still include lorem ipsum content.

findings.impact: Placeholder text undermines polish and signals unfinished experiences to users.

suggested_fix.approach: Replace lorem ipsum placeholders with production-ready copy in signatures.

findings.title: Missing error boundaries on major routes
findings.description: Top-level routes such as ProjectsPage, SettingsPage, and Admin Metrics render without ErrorBoundary wrappers.

proof_hooks.summary: App.tsx routes lack shared error boundary coverage.

findings.impact: Unhandled errors can crash the entire app and block navigation between workspaces.

suggested_fix.approach: Wrap major route components in a shared ErrorBoundary to isolate failures.

findings.title: Empty states lack guidance
findings.description: Workspace empty states note they are "intentional" without offering next steps or primary actions.

proof_hooks.summary: WorkspaceSurface empty state copy omits concrete guidance.

findings.impact: Users reaching an empty workspace do not know how to proceed, slowing activation.

suggested_fix.approach: Add targeted CTAs and guidance in WorkspaceSurface empty states to direct first actions.

findings.title: Unhelpful image alt text
findings.description: Generated image components use alt text like "Generated" or raw asset names without contextual meaning.

proof_hooks.summary: DesignCanvas renders generated asset previews with non-descriptive alt strings.

findings.impact: Screen reader users receive no meaningful description of generated assets, reducing accessibility.

suggested_fix.approach: Provide descriptive alt text that explains what the generated asset represents within the workspace.

findings.title: Undefined product voice
findings.description: No explicit product voice or tone guidance is documented alongside design tokens.

proof_hooks.summary: Design tokens focus on visuals without voice or tone definitions.

findings.impact: Copy decisions may drift across the app, leading to inconsistent tone and capitalization.

suggested_fix.approach: Document a default product voice guide (tone, capitalization, examples) and reference it in copy reviews.

next_actions.action: Standardize authentication terminology across login and signup flows.
next_actions.rationale: Reduces confusion on the primary entry points into the app.

next_actions.action: Wrap top-level routes in shared ErrorBoundary components.
next_actions.rationale: Prevents single-route failures from crashing the entire experience.

next_actions.action: Publish a concise product voice guide to align copy decisions.
next_actions.rationale: Keeps tone and capitalization consistent across new UI surfaces.
